pages.title: Tiefling
pages.text: Fiend-blooded. Normal size. Faint reddish skin, full darkvision baked in. Spawn and respawn in the Nether.

pages.title: Traits
pages.text: $(bold)Fiendish Sight.$(/) Full darkvision at all times.$(br2)$(bold)Infernal Body.$(/) Immune to all fire and lava damage.$(br2)$(bold)Hellish Rebuke.$(/) A melee attacker who sets you alight takes 2 fire damage back. Does not ignite them.$(br2)$(bold)Born of the Nether.$(/) Spawn point is set in the Nether; you respawn there.

pages.title: Drawback
pages.text: $(bold)Cursed by Water.$(/) Water contact and rain deal 2 damage per second (1 on Easy). This is the counterweight to fire immunity.$(br2)Stay dry. Roof everything.
